# SheFix Painting & Contracting

> Painter serving Kingston, NY and surrounding areas. SheFix Painting & Contracting provides quality painter services in Kingston, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: SheFix Painting & Contracting
- Category: Painter
- Location: Serving Kingston, NY, Kingston, NY
- Phone: +1 845-419-1067
- Email: contact@shefix-painting-contracting.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Interior Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/shefix-painting-contracting//services/interior/): Professional interior painting for homes and businesses.
- [Exterior Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/shefix-painting-contracting//services/exterior/): Exterior house painting and staining.
- [Cabinet Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/shefix-painting-contracting//services/cabinet/): Cabinet refinishing and painting.
- [Drywall](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/shefix-painting-contracting//services/drywall/): Drywall repair and installation.
- [Wallpaper](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/shefix-painting-contracting//services/wallpaper/): Wallpaper removal and installation.
- [Deck Staining](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/shefix-painting-contracting//services/deck/): Deck and fence staining.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all painter services.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Kingston, NY and surrounding communities.
- **How quickly can you respond?** We offer same-day and 24/7 emergency service for urgent issues.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** Yes, we stand behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
